name: Mine (MoneyGPT)
oneliner: AI personal finance agent for young adults that learns spending habits and provides autonomous financial advice
finserv: Personal finance platform with AI agent handling credit, saving, spending advice; connected to financial institutions
team: Rebranded from Fizz; demonstrated pivot capability
thesis: Mine/MoneyGPT represents exactly the 'front door' personal agent the thesis describes — an AI that handles financial discovery, planning, and execution. These agents will need regulated counterparties like You for execution.
